Meet the rest of the Leadership Team

John Saw, Ph.D.

Chief Technology Officer

Pioneering next-gen technology and connectivity

John Saw is the chief technology officer at T-Mobile, where he leads the team responsible for advancing America’s best network. In this role, he focuses on scaling the network and ensuring the Un-carrier continues to set the pace.

John’s team drives network innovation and evolution across architecture, engineering, operations and the company’s technology labs. This includes T-Innovate, which brings together partners, developers and the tech community to collaborate on wireless solutions, fuel the 5G ecosystem and shape standards for the 6G era. He also founded the AI-RAN Innovation Center, advancing standards for RAN intelligence and performance in collaboration with Ericsson, Nokia and NVIDIA. His team showcases the power of T-Mobile’s 5G standalone network through activations at events like the Las Vegas Grand Prix, PGA Championships and Major League Baseball.

Before joining T-Mobile in 2020, John was chief technology officer at Sprint, where he spearheaded the company’s 5G rollout and transformed the 2.5 GHz band into one of the most valuable spectrum assets in wireless. He previously had senior leadership roles at AT&T, Clearwire, Netro Corp., Nortel and Bell Northern Research.

John earned bachelor’s, master’s and doctorate degrees in electrical engineering from McMaster University in Canada. He is a fellow of the Canadian Academy of Engineering, has six patents in wireless technologies, and has served on the FCC’s broadband deployment advisory committee. He also advises the University of Washington’s College of Engineering and serves on the board of directors for CTIA, a trade association representing the U.S. wireless communications industry.

LinkedIn , opens in a new window
Meet the rest of the Leadership Team

Hello! Want to stay logged in?

To keep your accounts safe, you'll be automatically logged out in: 

Share your screen while on a call or in store

Get guided support from an Expert in real time

  • For your security, personal info, tabs, and notifications are automatically hidden.
  • You can stop screen sharing at any time.
  • Experts can only see what’s on T-Mobile.com.
  • Don’t use screen share while driving or in any situation where it's unsafe to focus on your screen.

By clicking 'Accept and continue,' you are consenting to allow the Expert to view your screen for assisted navigation. This session may be recorded. To learn more, please visit the  T-Mobile Privacy Notice.

Next: Generate a code to share with your Expert

Share this code with your Expert

code

Once your code has been successfully entered by your Expert, this window will close and continue to the session.

Allow screen sharing with your Expert?

Personal and sensitive data is hidden for your security and privacy.

End your session?

Ending your session will stop sharing your screen, but will not end your call.

Your session has ended

Your screen is no longer being shared with your Expert.

You are already in an active session

Your code has expired

Generate a new one to share with your Expert.
